comment: Today's teens seem more mature than I am
This part is literary so true. Bro their lyrics never disappoint.
Recently Soyeon has been making music about real issues as opposed to just fun sounding bops. She is starting to use her platform to educate, comfort and inspire. Good on her.

not only the song is good, but the message behind it is so amazing! people have too many beauty standards for idols and forget that their beauty doesn't define their talent. i'm so glad soyeon addresses this issue!

literally crying right now because of the lyrics, it's very relatable bc ive been insecure about my appearance & been comparing myself to others, bc people have been insulting my appearance & pointing out my insecurities as if i cant see it ever since i was a kid.. and unfortunately, i cant do anything about it. thank you so much (g)i-dle for this wonderful song i feel understood rn 😭 i'm always rooting for you all!

the lyrics hit so so hard for someone like me who has spent all her life looking at other pretty people with their bright and outgoing lives and feeling inferior to them. I hope gidle knows the amount of impact they have on the minds of us such girls who find a mirror and comfort in their songs. thank you so much for this 🤍

I feel like this is how Soyeon once felt, especially during Produce 101. Her skills were clearly up there but people only commented saying she wasn't pretty compared to the other contestants. But you can clearly see how far she's come with every new song released. As a whole, the girls have all become significantly more confident since debut. 🥹
In my opinion, this is one of the only songs that really speaks about people who are insecure about their looks and body types or shape.

I'm not a Neverland (I'm a Carat), but I love how (G)I-dle members are calling out toxic beauty standards through their music. It's really fascinating to know that they produce/write their own songs and are very much involved in the concept-making. This is one of the best things yt algorithm gave me. I love seeing empowered women using their influence to lift others. I think I might stan

(g)i-dle is just a group of talented geniuses. i love how soyeon is portrayed as the "ugly girl" since she considered herself as such before debuting and how the song speaks about an important issue a lot of people can relate to. no group is doing it like them ! idle fighting !
G-IDLE never fails me.... literally cried over how much I related to this song.... felt like I was in the mv. Thank you girls for always sticking up for people and comforting us,

STOPPP this song literally describes anyone who feels like they are trying to be someone else just bc of social media. I love this song sm and I'm so proud of the girls and how they displayed the emotions and the story. G-IDLE FIGHTING!!

I feel like this song should be heard by every person whether teenager or adult since everybody has tried to change themselves at some point to fit in. Everyone is different and that's what makes them special! You are beautiful just the way you are ❤

I actually cried when i read the lyrics. Not their fans but ik soyeon has been criticize for her look since pd101 despite being talented idol. Soyeon is a genius songwriter and use her platform wisely to spread meaningful and deep message in her songs. She's already pretty but it's just society is so cruel towards her
GIDLE has the best lyrics, as expected from SOYEON!! "Why am i not her" and "Why am i me" hit hard
The fact that they teach young teenagers and young adults to love and accept themselves without having to worry about the strict beauty standards 🩷 MAD RESPECT FOR THIS GROUP RIGHT HERE!

I really thought (G)I-DLE would pull an Uno reverse with the concept by having deep lyrics, and indeed they did! But I didn't expect the lyrics to hit this hard. The lyrics especially "I want to dance HYPE BOY but on screen I look like TOMBOY" hit especially hard cause everyone makes fun of the way I dance. I love (G)I-DLE for this. More power to you queens!

It's weird because the MV looks bright but when you realize how deep it cuts you, you start to cry. I started imagining this was what Soyeon had to go through during Produce 101. All the hate comments made her hate herself while looking at the mirror. Soyeon, such a great storyteller you are. You are indeed a gem of this industry.

I love how this song is about standards, G-IDLE is literally being amazing right now, The song Nxde for the awareness of people searching bad things on internet, The song 'Change' because we would all know everyone changes how they are and we all spilt up in life, And now Allergy. We love G-IDLE for this reason of being aware of stuff and beauty when people think their ugly. Literally queens.

The lyrics of this song are so straight to the point, and I'm here for it. Gidle is one of the most valuable gg out there, always unique, always true to themselves. It's great how they are some of the few who manage to give both meaningful yet catchy songs.
Thank you Soyeon for this song! I feel like it's going to help so many girls all around the world honestly. This song is wonderful and talking about a real life issue. So much respect for this

The message behind the song and the mv is really so great! Especially in kpop these days. It really touches on the subject of the whole unrealistic beauty standard and life in general. Gidle is indeed a great group and this song is a comfort song tbvh, you don't have to change yourself for anybody's love and validation.

Its my first time watching (G) I DLE MV and i feel like crying, their music and lyrics are soo good i love all of their song and i think i become a fangirl from today 😭i always complain about my looks and have so much negative mind but i found soo much motivated after listening their song ❤️

The whole "Why am I not perfect" concept is probably one of the best yet. The message that this song portrays is truly something that I haven't ever seen before. I love that everyone has a character, and I wish Soojin was here!! Neverland is so proud of you, Soyeon. Definitely adding it to my playlist!!
Their songs are about women empowerment and social issues. That's why I love this group. :)

This song is so catchy! Makes me confused that the lyrics are actually so painful, only Soyeon could pull that - completely out of the box! She and all the girls are so talented. I hope everyone takes this message into their hearts. We can't keep pushing ourselves to achieve these unattainable standards. Be happy and love others because they make you happy, not because they have the latest trendy outfit or are beautiful! Life is too short!

I cried watching the MV...this is a reality for a lot of Filipinos that don't fit the west's standard for beauty. We're plagued with ads for products to whiten your skin, fix your hair, and more. It's so refreshing to see a GG concept like this. Looking forward to the next part. Thank you, G-IDLE.
Невероятная песня... очень описывает состояние многих подростков (и взрослых людей). Пусть каждый человек сможет полюбить и принять себя!

this song is so meaningful. not only for calling out toxic beauty standards, but also because soyeon was given so much shit for the way she looked, that she "wasnt pretty enough" to be an idol and how she was able to express those emotions in this pop punky song that can become a release for fans all over the world who are feeling the same. g-idle is turning me into a fan ❤

Their music style reminds me of Avril Lavigne and the way they play with their unique voices is so amazing. Plus, with every song they managed to touch sensitive topics women faced in our society. All in all, these queens are rocking my world.

This is crazy... Noo I'm going crazy.... The beats... The dance... The vocals.... The visuals.... Everything is so dope... I'm literally crazy for (G)I-DLE.... Please they're just so amazing..Every time they surpass my expectations...

I've seen some negative comments about the lyrics not being that deep and I just want to come here and say that as someone struggling with severe body dysmorphia, this song made me breakdown. For those of us with crippling low self esteem, these lyrics hit home hard. Soyeon in my opinion is a brilliant lyricist, she keep the lyrics simple and the vibe of the song is fun and has the vibe of early noughties punk pop whilst still covering some pretty intense mental health topics. I love all of Gidle's music but I think this is one of their best songs. It's got a real throwback vibe to the music video and Miyeon's chorus makes me choke up every time. Thank you Gidle ❤ I love you.

They are once again talking about a heavy topic after lion, tomboy,nxde with allergy where they depicts the cruel society where female has to be forced to meet into beauty standard . woaahhh soyeon a genius.the social message,the acting, the voice, the song, the outfits every single thing is top notch. We Neverland can and always will flex with our gidle with the actual thing that matters like lyrics, talent.

Soyeon has always been beautiful and I honestly think there's nothing wrong with her face. She said she hated looking at herself in the mirror which is sad. She must have heard a lot of hate comments for her looks. To me, she has beautiful features and really fit her role as a rapper. She looks badass and sophisticated. She doesn't need to look like someone else

For the first time in my life ..i cried when I watched a music video..i always tend to listen to the music video itself,enjoy the music ,rythem and styles but when Minnie started saying she hates Instagram and they all talked about how social media influenced us badly i started to cry when the chorus came and i just didn't took my eyes off of the subtitle...thank you g-idle for always being so different,honest
i literally started crying at the end of the MV. thank you g idle, thank you for this deep message, which is a real problem among teenagers like me.♥️
Omg the meaning in the lyrics of this song is so touching. I'm sure many people around the world could relate and appreciate the lyrics. Ngl i teared up a bit listening to this thanks again (G)I-dle!
This song went out exactly when I am feeling insecure about myself. Thank you (G)I-DLE for existing! You are the best!!

G-idle reflects the problems of society's young people so well that i really like the work they do :') After seeing this i felt really broken, i realized that i really not alone in this, im not the only one who had the pain of not being able to look in the mirror every day. Everyone around me is very beautiful and they seem really happy with their lives, of course they have other problems but i don't think they can understand the problems of those gathered under this song, you can never understand without living, but they never tried to understand.. i feel so bad that all the girls except me are have a so pretty face, they have tall stature and attractive body lines, they are fun and they have a lot of friends,, the feeling of not having them makes me feel so broken.. seriously how can a person have so many things without doing anything, this is a blessing for me that i may never achieve, because i know well the pain of trying to achieve the appearance i want every day and it's as if i was created for this, seriously if i disappear one day it wouldn't be such a big loss for this world because i know that there's nothing about me that's worth it, it hurts me.. please let's try to love ourselves no matter what, no matter how we look, because remember that you are a special person and there is nothing like you✨

I don't usually leave comments and I'm new in the kpop world, but this song came out in the right time. I struggle everyday with body dysmorphia, and these days is getting worse, but watching this video and listening to this song made me feel like i'm not alone, that everyone has his own insecurities and that not necessarily beauty means being happier and more loved, that having lots of likes and followers doesn't make us feel less lonely and more "seen". Very beautiful concept, I think I'll appreciate the entire album! <3

the little detail i love most about this mv, is that in the very start when soyeon was looking at herself, in the background, queencard was playing, this might mean that she was so insecure that even if she tried, she couldn't relate to queencard in any way

In 0:01 you can hear their song 'QUEENCARD' that means that the song with the 'ALLERGY' is in a loop!! These two are masterpiece and well-written. No matter who you are, this song gives a message that saying you are lovely and this song gives positivity that all of us are QUEENS and all of us must know how to LOVE ourselves. Keep it up girls! 👑

Shout out to (G)i-dle for keep making meaningful songs about women issue and empowerment. The MV concept is also on point; girls want to be other girls; other girls also want to be other girls etc not realizing they're all beautiful and unique in their own way 🥰

This is making me cry. The peer pressure society is giving to young girls, woman is insane. this song gives me comfort that I'm not the only one who's struggling to fit. G-idle is really that artist that knows what the society is dealing especially their fellow girlies out there.
I love how this mv addresses so many issues teens are experiencing nowadays and at the same time still slay the mv and song so much!! 👏🏻💖

I'm crying, the videos and lyrics are so relatable for anyone who struggling with their self esteem. This song makes me realize that everyone is struggling. Yes, there's no better life than the life we're living. Thank you girls, now I can love myself more💜

The meaning of this song is so strong because it relates so much to the beauty standards in society and how people are insecure and constantly think they aren't pretty enough. This song was soooo lovely 🥰

This is probably the first ever g-idle song I relate to,, I cried listening to this bcuz I can relate to it sm. Altho everyone was after the femininity of another, I can relate to the premise where I can't love myself bcuz I hate myself and having mirror allergies. I love this song sm and these queens doesn't disappoint
I've joined another fandom for 6 months, but I've support Yuqi for 3 years, this song is the first song that makes me cry, the part "Why am I me?" hits me hard
I'm allergic to the beauty standards nowadays, it makes me feel that happiness merely depends on my look which is not true. So thankful that (G) I-DLE released this song ❤
As a teenager, I feel the lyrics. I feel so different when I look at other teens online. Thanks (G)I-DLE! 💕

The lyrics hit home!!!! In this age of social media a LOT of us are burdened with Body Dysmorphia and this song just helped me in some way. Like it told me what was wrong with this mindset without pointing it out. I love the girls for coming out with such a BOP with a meaningful message. (G)-idle ABSOLUTE SLAY!!!!

This song really shows how teenagers are comparing themselves with others and their addiction to social media like the lyrics says everything " she's soo pretty ya so lovely she got everything why am I not her " and more From tomboy era g idle have changed a lot like giving concern to people and taking what's really happening in the society stan these queens ❤

Okay I'm gonna say this here, I love the concept of this song because it is so relatable to many people and it's true how social media shape our thinking and make us more insecure. I'm not G-IDLE fan but their music is good even more I really admire soyeon, how she write many songs and compose them.
It's amazing how (G)I-DLE is using their popularity to speak about social media standards and how people do everything to fit into these standards. This is why I love them so much 💖
This song explains Normal teens with insecurities.. Miyeon's Line "Why ain't i pretty? Why ain't I Lovely?" Explains the whole song.

I love this song so much. I am struggling a lot with body dysmorphia. I am also an introvert and boring person. I don't have a likeable personality. Even as a boy, I can relate to this. 🥲🥲🥲 I wanted to explore the world, but I feel like I am trapped inside a box because I fear how the world would judge me.

Soyeon knows what we think about ourselves, she know about the image tiktok and instagram are making, she knows about everything so she make musics that would help us understanding that we are not alone, and we deserve so much

They are so real for this! Love that they're spreading awareness of issues that the majority of youth (especially young women) are struggling with today. Haven't even finished the song yet, and I'm already getting the feels! It's like they took the words out of my own mouth 🥹💕
The concepts are never disappointing !!! and (G)I-dle always gives so much meaning to their songs 💓💓 gosh the chorus is so addicting. And the outfits and theme was so amazing omd.
The only group that actually raises voice for actual women empowerment. Hats off to them for making such a relatable song

I'm SO impressed by how idle does this thing where they put social commentary in their songs while explicitly acting out the said social norm, they did that with Nxde and now Allergy too. A lot of groups do the whole "self love" thing for the concept, in fact I think its become a trend, ironically. But idle is truly the only one that pulls it off this well, cant wait for Queencard❤❤❤

Am I the only one that listening to the song and watching the video makes you want to cry? In this industry like kpop, more artists like Gidle are needed who dare to talk about important issues and give important messages like self-love
As someone who struggle from insecurity, this got me tear up so bad, thank you g idle for giving the courage to love myself ❤️❤️

Idk why but when I heard this song, I cried so hard. This is the reality of social media. I really want (G)idle to have a really good recognition like Black pink and other popular groups have. These girls are so hardworking.

1:58 THESE SHOTS RIGHT HERE are so cool. I love how it's still because they're supposed the be the pictures SY is looking at, but it all also suggests at the girls' insecurities too. But SY can't see that and just shows the doctors as if they're super pretty pics she wants to become. Very much like IRL social media.
This is by far one of the best MVs I've ever seen.The way they r dealing with the modern society and the influence and Impact it has on everyone is so pure and personal... Our Queens have spoken.

i'm not a neverland although i enjoy listening to gidle's songs lately and i find this song not only a bop but a vision of our daily problems and expectations as a society, thanks gidle for giving visibility to what people and mostly teenagers are experiencing constantly in this generation!! this is the correct way to make positive impacts trough music!! ❤️‍🩹
The popularity of GIDLE around the world is a symbol of the coming of a "new era" where people pay more and more attention to "inner values" instead of superficial appearances!

These girls are awesome... Not only have mastered the whole kpop concept, but now they are expanding it and making a social contibution by making this refined yet harsh criticism to the industry. I love them.
I love how Queencard plays at the beginning of the mv in the background! It's like people outside are queens while she thinks she isn't (even though she is ofc)
I love "Allergy" so much ,(G)i-dle perfectly portrayed society pressure towards blending in Beauty standards.

allergy and queencard are lowkey the best gidle music videos, in my opinion. they are so meaningful and fun. i swear ive watched them sooo many times, especially when im feeling insecure. they helped me so much and made me realize that perfection does not exist and that i actually am a queencard.
I love and hate how I really relate to this song. It really sucks to be insecure about your appearance and profile in the society.

I love how this MV shows that everyone has problems and some light-jealously—Soyeon here wants to be pretty, cool and party-princess like Mieyon, while Mieyon just wants to be loved by that guy who now loves Minnie, but Minnie said to Soyeon that she(Soyeon) could be like her(Minnie), which doesn't directly means it but I guess it's about that she wants to also have friends

know.. a lot of tears were shed to this song from complexes, self-hatred.. every time I listen to it I just want to disappear because of all this negativity and self-hatred.. but I don't hate this song. i love idle.❤

I thank Soyeon for making a song like this and for all of (g)i-dle for putting so much work into this song. The lyrics are so close to my heart and the mean is very dear to me. I've felt the meaning of this song all my life so thank you (g)i-dle. Thank you. You mean so much to me as a group. Love you so very much.
Why this song make me cry even me not being girl😂😂 The lyrics and the flow of song made me so shocked that i just can't move! my most favorite song of my favorite k-pop group
Allergy is such a good song, its also has a deep meaning. It has me relating to it on a deep level. I love it so much I'm literally never letting it go lol
歌詞は切なくて、聴いた時も悲しくなるのになぜか最後のラララの歌の部分で笑顔になるから不思議。わたしにとって魔法みたいな音楽だわ。こんな素敵な曲を産んでくれてありがとう！！idleのみんな愛してる

Oh goshh!! The lyrics always holds so much meanings! They never disappointed their fans with their songs. They hold such amazing meanings behind their songs!! Its so true that we are never satisfied with ourselves and admire others more than we do to ourselves! They create such amazing songs! LOVE YOU A LOT G-(IDLE). you are the best!!
何度見ても泣く。Queencardも好きだけど、Allergyを聴いて泣きたい日の方が私は多くて、そんな日も一緒にいてくれるgidolが大好き
I have never felt so identified with a song, but with
I do, G-idle you are a very special group💞 I am and will always be a Neverland at heart~ ✧♥️
たくさんコンプレックスがあって人と比べてしまっていた私がヘアセットやメイクで魔法がかかったみたいにモチベが上がってちょっと自分のこと好きになれたから同じように悩み持つ人の背中を押す手伝いをちょっとでも出来たらいいなと思って美容師になったことをこの曲を初めて聞いたときに改めて思い出してそこから毎朝通勤しながらこの曲を聞いて
って気合い入れてる✨ 毎朝お世話になってます🙇‍♀️素敵な曲をありがとう!(G)I-DLE！
この曲に出会ったばかりです、こんな曲歌ってくれるアイドルなんているんだってすごく刺さりました😿🩶 出会えて良かったです 救われました
This song and video hits deeper than people realize. So much respect to I-dle for bringing a topic like this to the forefront 👏🏾♥️
the lyrics of this song actually make me wanna cry along with the nostaglic feeling music
自分に自信がなくて大嫌いだったけどこの曲の歌詞を見て泣いてしまいました。少しだけど自信が持てました。私だって誰かに愛されたい、どうしてあの子じゃないの、と言う歌詞にとても共感しました。私も少しでも自分を好きになれるように今から運動します。

I love how gidle keep coming back with meaningful lyrics in their tracks. This is really amazing because they have a large audience and they use it to address important topics that affect a lot of people, especially young girls. Thank you for giving voice to all of us

As I watch the whole music video, I realized some meaningful scenes in here and it really happens in real life. (G)I-DLE's concept is so different and to every song they released, they really leave a meaningful thought to all of us.
(G)-IDLE never disappoints with a song that talks about how teenagers feel and the stereotypes that society has really placed on the few groups that explain well what they want to transmit!
가사가 너무 와닿아서 방구석에서 완전 울었음..내 일기장인줄 알았음..요즘 자존잠이든 자신감이든 너무 많이 떨어졌었는데 이 노래가 딱 나한테 주는 선물 같아엽… 언니들 진챠 사룽햄..❤ 빌어먹을 내 거울 알러지 ㄹㅇ 가사 잘썼다..

Так круто, что девочки затрагивают такие темы как нелюбовь к себе, ведь для многих это актуально. Непонимание, что с тобой не так, почему все такие, а я нет. В этой песне идеально всë! Смысл, мелодия, клип и всë остальное.
처음 이 곡을 들었을 때 6번은 돌려볼면서 20분 동안 가사 곱 씹으면서 울었던 거 같아요 정말 어떻게 별면 신나보일수있는 곡이지만 가사가 제 현실을 말하는 거 같아서 눈물이 나오더라고요 진짜 이런 가사를 생각하신 전소연님 존경합니다 ㅠ
I am addicted to this line "Please give me the hate buttom" i love so much this song is so beautiful and the lyrics touch my heart so hard
first time i've ever seen artists address plastic surgery and toxic social media so directly... like, in kpop but also western artists. I love gidle for being so different and direct, very admirable
I cried, I felt the lyrics, Thank you (G)I-DLE 💜 for being amazing

I have so much respect and admiration for G idle. These messages are so important and they use their idol status to create and spread these messages. Its so amazing to see, especially from the kpop industry

Well done,(G) I-DLE. I think at this point, it's clear that their music isn't just " Dance Challenge" material, but it's about making issues visible to people who like music, and also about representing what our society has become and will become.

I thank Soyeon for making a song like this and for all of (g)i-dle for putting so much work into this song. The lyrics are so close to my heart and the mean is very dear to me. I've felt the meaning of this song all my life so thank you (g)i-dle. Thank you. You mean so much to me as a group. Love you so very much.
